title: CulinaryOps
tagline: Automated social media and marketing for food businesses.
description: CulinaryOps handles the marketing layer of a food business — auto-scheduling daily specials, posting to Instagram and Facebook, generating caption copy, and tracking engagement — so chefs can cook instead of post.
story: After helping a friend's food truck manually post their daily specials every morning at 7am, I built a system that does it automatically. What started as a Python script became a full platform that any food business can connect to their socials.
forWho: Food truck owners, restaurant marketers, and solo operators who know social media matters but don't have time to manage it.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Flask web app with a background task scheduler (APScheduler). Gemini API generates caption copy from a menu data object. Meta Graph API handles publish calls.
detailedSpecs.dataFlow: Menu item data entered → Gemini generates caption variants → operator approves or auto-publishes → post sent to Facebook/Instagram → engagement logged.
keyPatterns: Gemini prompt templating for brand-consistent copy
OAuth2 token refresh flow for Meta
